title: Save a manual task and see it in history
description: Verifies that a user can create a finished task with manual duration and see it added to task history with updated summary totals.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the new task dialog
Fill in the task name with a unique value
Choose manual time entry mode
Enter a valid number of hours
Enter a valid number of minutes
Submit the task form
Verify the new finished task appears in task history
Verify the summary totals update for the selected period

title: Log a manual task and see it counted in the summary
description: This verifies a user can create a finished task with manual time and see it appear in history with the summary cards updated for the selected period.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new task in manual time mode
Fill in a unique task name
Select manual time entry
Fill in a valid number of hours
Fill in a valid number of minutes
Save the task
Verify the new task appears in history
Verify the total hours and task count summary update for the selected period

title: Start, pause, resume, and stop a timer task
description: Verifies that a timer-based task can be paused and resumed before stopping, and that the saved task is finalized with elapsed time.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the new task dialog
Fill in the task name with a unique value
Choose timer mode
Start the timer
Pause the timer
Resume the timer
Stop the timer
Verify the task is saved as finished
Verify the saved duration is displayed in history

title: Create a timer task and finish it from the running state
description: This verifies a user can start, pause, resume, and stop a live timer task and have the completed elapsed time saved in history.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new task in timer mode
Fill in a unique task name
Start the timer
Pause the timer
Resume the timer
Stop the timer and save the task
Verify the task appears as completed in history
Verify the saved duration is shown in the task entry

title: Delete a task from history
description: Verifies that a user can delete a task from the history list and it is removed after confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Choose a task in the history
Delete the task
Confirm the deletion
Verify the task is removed from history

title: Save a manual task with a project
description: Verifies that a user can create a finished manual task assigned to a project and see the project association in history.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the new task dialog
Fill in the task name with a unique value
Select an active project
Choose manual time entry mode
Enter a valid number of hours
Enter a valid number of minutes
Submit the task form
Verify the new task appears in history
Verify the task shows the selected project association

title: Create a project and use it on a new task
description: Verifies that a user can add a project on the Projects view and then assign it to a newly created task.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Projects view
Add a new project with a unique name
Return to the task creation view
Open the new task dialog
Fill in the task name with a unique value
Select the newly created project
Choose manual time entry mode
Enter a valid number of hours
Enter a valid number of minutes
Submit the task form
Verify the new task appears in history
Verify the task is associated with the created project

title: Filter task history by project and date range
description: This verifies a user can narrow task history using the date range and project filters and see the summary cards reflect the filtered period.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a date range
Select a project filter
Apply the filters
Verify the history list reflects the selected filters
Verify the total hours and task count summary update for the filtered period

title: Create a project and see it available for task assignment
description: This verifies a user can add a new project from the projects view and have it appear in the active project list for task creation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the projects view
Enter a unique project name
Add the project
Verify the new project appears in the active project list
Verify the project is available for selection on task creation

title: View tasks with no project using the project filter
description: This verifies a user can filter history to tasks without a project and still see the summary cards update for that selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select the no-project filter
Verify only unassigned tasks are shown in history
Verify the summary cards update for the no-project selection

title: Show only unassigned tasks with the Sem projeto filter
description: Verifies that selecting the unassigned project filter shows only tasks without a project.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select the Sem projeto project filter
Verify only unassigned tasks are shown

title: Assign a project to a new task and keep it in history
description: This verifies a user can create a task linked to a project and later see that project association preserved in task history.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new project if needed
Create a new task in manual time mode
Fill in a unique task name
Select the created project
Fill in a valid number of hours
Fill in a valid number of minutes
Save the task
Verify the task appears in history with the selected project
Verify the task is associated with the project in the history view

title: Clear task filters and restore the full history
description: Verifies that clearing applied filters restores the complete task history and default summary view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a start date in the filter area
Select a project filter
Clear the applied filters
Verify the full task history is shown again
Verify the summary cards return to the unfiltered view

title: Show running and paused timer states
description: Verifies that timer state changes are reflected in the UI while a timer is running and after it is paused.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the new task dialog
Fill in the task name with a unique value
Choose timer mode
Start the timer
Verify the task is shown as running
Pause the timer
Verify the task is shown as paused

title: Rename a project and see the updated name reflected
description: This verifies a user can rename an existing project and see the new name in the active project list and related task context.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the projects view
Select an existing project to rename
Enter a new project name
Save the project name change
Verify the updated project name appears in the active project list
Verify tasks linked to that project show the updated association

title: Rename a project and keep historical tasks linked
description: Verifies that renaming a project updates the project name while historical tasks remain associated with that project.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Projects view
Add a new project with a unique name
Rename the project
Return to the task history view
Verify historical tasks retain the project association
Verify the renamed project is shown in the project list

title: Show validation when manual task name is missing
description: Verifies that saving a manual task without a name is blocked and a validation message is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the new task dialog
Choose manual time entry mode
Enter a valid number of hours
Enter a valid number of minutes
Submit the task form
Verify a name validation error is visible
Verify the task is not added to history

title: Handle invalid manual task input before saving
description: This verifies a user sees validation when trying to save a manual task with missing or invalid time details and the task is not created.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new task in manual time mode
Leave the task name empty
Fill in an invalid duration
Save the task
Verify a validation error is shown
Verify the task is not added to history

title: Show validation when manual duration is zero
description: Verifies that saving a manual task with zero duration is blocked and a duration validation message is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the new task dialog
Fill in the task name with a unique value
Choose manual time entry mode
Enter zero hours
Enter zero minutes
Submit the task form
Verify a duration validation error is visible
Verify the task is not added to history

title: Soft-delete a project without losing historical task labels
description: Verifies that soft-deleting a project removes it from active selection while historical tasks still display the project label.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Projects view
Add a new project with a unique name
Create a task assigned to the new project
Soft-delete the project
Return to the task history view
Verify historical tasks still show the deleted project label
Verify the project is no longer available as an active selection

title: Soft-delete a project while keeping historical task associations
description: This verifies a user can remove a project from the active list without losing the project label on previously recorded tasks.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the projects view
Select an existing project to remove
Confirm the deletion
Verify the project is removed from the active project list
Verify historical tasks still show the project association

title: Handle the empty task history state
description: Verifies that when no tasks match the current filters, the app shows an empty state instead of task rows.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a date range with no matching tasks
Select a project filter with no matching tasks
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no task rows are displayed
